name: Saddle Peak National Park
description: Home to the highest point in the Andaman Islands at 732 meters, this national park offers challenging treks through pristine tropical rainforest with stunning panoramic views.
history: Declared a national park in 1979 to protect the unique tropical evergreen and moist deciduous forests of North Andaman.
famousFor: Highest peak in Andaman (732m) and tropical rainforest trekking
